name: fourinsight-api
documentation:
# 4Insight API for Python

`fourinsight.api` is your portal to [4Insight.io] in Python, and facilitates secure calls to the [4Insight REST API] endpoints.

`fourinsight.api` is mainly used by other high-level 4Insight Python packages. However, it can also be used to make low-level calls.

[4insight rest api]: https://4insight-api-prod.4subsea.net/swagger/index.html
[4insight.io]: https://4insight.io

modules.name: fourinsight.api.appdirs
documentation:
This code was taken from https://github.com/ActiveState/appdirs (v1.4.4) and
modified to suit our purposes.

functions.name: fourinsight.api.appdirs.user_data_dir
documentation:
Return full path to the user-specific data dir for a `fourinsight`
submodule. "module_name" is the name of the different submodules. If None,
just the `fourinsight` root directory is returned.

OS specific directories are:

: Mac OS X:               ~/.config/.fourinsight/\<module_name>
  Unix:                   ~/.fourinsight/\<module_name>
  Windows:                ~/.fourinsight/\<module_name>

classes.name: fourinsight.api.authenticate.BaseAuthSession

methods.name: fourinsight.api.authenticate.BaseAuthSession.fetch_token
documentation: Fetch new access and refresh token.

methods.name: fourinsight.api.authenticate.BaseAuthSession.refresh_token
documentation: Refresh (expired) access token with a valid refresh token.

methods.name: fourinsight.api.authenticate.BaseAuthSession._prepare_fetch_token_args
documentation:
Prepare positional and keyword arguments passed on to
`OAuth2Session.fetch_token`. Subclass overrides.

methods.name: fourinsight.api.authenticate.BaseAuthSession._prepare_refresh_token_args
documentation:
Prepare positional and keyword arguments passed on to
`OAuth2Session.refresh_token`. Subclass overrides.

methods.name: fourinsight.api.authenticate.BaseAuthSession.request
documentation:
Extend the `requests_oauthlib.OAuth2Session.request` method
to supply default arguments.

methods.name: fourinsight.api.authenticate.BaseAuthSession.get
documentation:
Extend the `requests_oauthlib.OAuth2Session.get` method
to ensure that internal API are not accessed.

methods.name: fourinsight.api.authenticate.BaseAuthSession.get_pages
documentation:
Sends GET requests, and returns a generator that lets the user iterate over
paginated responses. Note that the endpoint must support OData; the json
response should include the a parameter <mailto:'@odata.nextLink>', providing the
URL for the next page.

# Parameters

url

: API endpoint. To return pages, the endpoint must support OData and contain
  the parameter <mailto:'@odata.nextLink>'.

kwargs :

: Optional keyword arguments. Will be passed on to the `get` method.

# Yields

response

: The response as a {class}`Response` object.

Abstract class for authorized sessions.

# Parameters

client

: A client passed on to `requests_oauthlib.OAuth2Session`.

token_url

: Token endpoint URL, must use HTTPS.

session_params: dict

: Dictionary containing the necessary parameters used during
  authentication. Use these parameters when overriding the
  '\_prepare_fetch_token_args' and '\_prepare_refresh_token_args' methods.
  The provided dict is stored internally in '\_session_params'.

auth_force

: Force re-authenticating the session (default is False)

kwargs

: Keyword arguments passed on to `requests_oauthlib.OAuth2Session`.
  Here, the mandatory parameters for the authentication client shall be
  provided.

classes.name: fourinsight.api.authenticate.UserSession
documentation:
Authorized session where credentials are given in the 4insight.io web
application. When a valid code is presented, the session is authenticated
and persisted. A previous session will be reused as long as it is not
expired. When required, a new authentication code is prompted for.

Extends {class}`~fourinsight.api.authenticate.BaseAuthSession`.

# Parameters

auth_force

: Force re-authenticating the session (default is False)

session_key

: Unique identifier for an auth session. Can be used so that multiple
  instances can have independent auth/refresh cycles with the identity
  authority. Prevents local cache from being accidently overwritten.

classes.name: fourinsight.api.authenticate.ClientSession
documentation:
Authorized session where credentials are given as client_id and
client_secret. When valid credentials are presented, the session is
authenticated and persisted.

Extends {class}`~fourinsight.api.authenticate.BaseAuthSession`.

# Parameters

client_id

: Unique identifier for the client (i.e. app/service etc.).

client_secret

: Secret/password for the client.
